chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-283 of 2024 (Muhammad Saffar and others Vs. Province of Sindh & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on CMA No. 1203/2024 (U/A) 2. For Orders on Office objection. 3. For Orders on CMA No. 1204/2024 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case. 20-03-2024. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Bhatt, advocate for the petitioners. ******** 1. Granted. 2. Over ruled. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. The petitioners by way of instant petition have sought for direction against the respondents to provide irrigation water to him through a pipe of sizeable measurement. Supply of water through a pipeline is subject to its availability that too after resolving the objections to be filed by other Stake holders on such supply; therefore, direction sought for by the petitioner, if issued would amount to interfere with the functions of the officials; as such it could not be issued by this Court in exercise of its Constitutional jurisdiction by way of instant petition, same being misconceived is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Nasim/P.A
